intro: Ecdysanthera glandulifera, also known as the glandular ecdysanthera, is a plant species native to tropical regions, classified under the family Rubiaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to alleviate symptoms of various conditions such as fever and digestive issues.
